parts.name: MX-style mechanical switch (soldered, no hotswap)
parts.notes: Specific switch undecided; MX variant. Choc variant gets its own BOM minor bump.

parts.name: Keycap set covering the 60-key Alice layout
parts.notes: Needs Alice kit: 2.25u + 2.75u spacebars, 1.25u bottom mods, mirrored B.

parts.name: PCB-mount stabilizer, 2u class
parts.notes: Bksp 2u, Enter 2.25u, Shifts 2.25/2.75u, spacebars 2.25/2.75u — all take 2u-class wire.

parts.name: Matrix diode 1N4148W (SOD-123)
parts.notes: One per key; standard choice, pending schematic.

parts.name: Wireless MCU module (candidate: nRF52840)
parts.notes: Blocked on ROADMAP Phase 0 feature-architecture decision (BLE-only vs dongle-also; ZMK color-display tension).

parts.name: Center color display (candidates: ST7789 240x280 1.69", GC9A01 round 240x240)
parts.notes: Part choice sets the real center-bay size and layout SPLIT_EXTRA. Blocked on Phase 0.

parts.name: LiPo battery + charging path
parts.notes: Size TBD after case envelope; only needed if wireless decision sticks.
